title: Delhi NCR Urban Expansion Replay
description: Urban construction progression replay with winter windows chosen to reduce cloud interference.
task_text: Track a bare-ground construction footprint becoming persistent built surface.
summary: A four-frame Sentinel-2 urban replay for built-surface growth review across 2023, 2024, 2025, and 2026 winter windows.

alerts.timelapse_analysis: The winter-window sequence gives the model stable urban context while limiting cloud interference, with the first frame still marked as lower-quality context.
alerts.analysis_summary: This replay broadens mission coverage into urban expansion while preserving quality metadata so clouds do not become model certainty.
alerts.satellite_note: Orbital triage retained the Delhi/NCR urban sequence as a built-surface review candidate.
alerts.ground_note: Ground review keeps the mission in review mode with explicit quality provenance on the lower-valid first frame.
alerts.ground_action: REVIEW — urban expansion candidate is useful for built-surface training with quality metadata attached.
findings: Winter windows reduce cloud interference for the urban mission
The first frame is accepted but carries partial cloud/haze quality context
